headline: PWR Q1 Earnings Top Estimates on Strong Execution, 2026 View Raised
summary: Quanta tops Q1 estimates on strong segment execution, lifting margins and backlog, and prompting management to raise its 2026 outlook.

headline: Martin Marietta Q1 Earnings Miss Estimates, Revenues Beat, Stock Up
summary: MLM Q1 earnings miss despite revenue growth, as strong aggregates demand is offset by rising costs and margin pressure.
